$comment: Asset manifest for the Delphi-OBD design-time package.
Each entry produces one PNG under assets/designtime/. The
generator script (generate.py) calls OpenAI's image API with
model 'gpt-image-2' and writes the result to <out>.
Conventions:
- 'kind' is informational; the script doesn't branch on it.
- 'size' is whatever gpt-image-2 supports natively (square
sizes only). The script downscales to 'final_size' with
Lanczos resampling. Component icons end at 256 px; RAD
Studio downscales to 16/24/32 itself for the palette.
- References (top-level) are POSTed to /v1/images/edits as
multipart 'image[]' fields so gpt-image-2 anchors style
on the brand logo.
Style guide for prompts (keep consistent across icons):
- Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI icon style: 2D
with subtle depth — slight isometric / dimetric tilt,
soft layered shading, clean geometric shapes. Modern
and recognisable, not flat-flat and not photoreal.
- Use ONLY colours that appear in the attached reference
logo. Don't enumerate them in the prompt — let the
model lift the palette directly from the reference.
- White background.
- Centered subject, even padding, no text.
